calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Mar-15-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Agnieszka Adams for Amina Haji.

Ms. Agnieszka explained the process in the sale of SaveUp Inc., stated that a merger was approved by the Board of Directors, that her Client felt the Board of Directors did their due diligence, that payment hasn't been made and that The Company is pursuing Westlake. Ms. Agnieszka also stated that her Client has decided not to pursue Westlake until they see what happens with The Company's causes of action, that they have not made a decision on how to pursue it, that there is one million dollars in cash that the Guardian's are prepared to take over, that the option of partial distribution would continue fees and that the Co Founder also got nothing. Furthermore, Ms. Agnieszka stated that the stock option evaluation was done in September of 2013, that her Client died in 2014 and that the Referee used the same value. The First and Final Report on Waiver of Account, etc. was taken under submission.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Court Examiner: Sandy Hilton. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: A. Jaime. Not reported.
